glossaryPage.metaTitle: Web Development Glossary & FAQ - Alexis Olivero
glossaryPage.metaDescription: Common questions about web development, SEO, performance, and frontend architecture explained clearly.
glossaryPage.title: Web Development Glossary
glossaryPage.subtitle: Clear answers to complex technical questions.

faqs.question: What is Headless CMS and why should I use it?
faqs.answer: A Headless CMS (like Sanity or Strapi) decouples the backend content management from the frontend presentation. This allows you to use the same content across multiple channels (web, mobile app, smartwatches) and gives developers the freedom to use modern frameworks like Next.js for better performance and security.

faqs.question: How does Core Web Vitals impact my SEO?
faqs.answer: Core Web Vitals are Google's standardized metrics for user experience. They measure loading speed (LCP), interactivity (INP), and visual stability (CLS). A poor score can significantly lower your search rankings because Google prioritizes sites that offer a smooth user experience.

faqs.question: Why migrate from WordPress to Next.js?
faqs.answer: While WordPress is great for simple blogs, Next.js offers superior performance through server-side rendering (SSR) and static site generation (SSG). It provides better security (no direct database exposure), instant page transitions, and complete design flexibility without being constrained by themes.

faqs.question: What is Technical SEO?
faqs.answer: Technical SEO refers to website and server optimizations that help search engine spiders crawl and index your site more effectively. It includes sitemaps, robots.txt, schema markup, canonical tags, site speed, and mobile-friendliness.

faqs.question: How do you ensure web accessibility (WCAG)?
faqs.answer: I follow WCAG 2.1 AA standards by using semantic HTML, proper ARIA labels, sufficient color contrast, keyboard navigation support, and screen reader testing. This ensures your digital product is usable by everyone, including people with disabilities.

plugins.title: OliveroDev Media Audit
plugins.tagline: Find unused media. Recover storage. Zero guesswork.
plugins.description: The WordPress media library cleaner that actually works. Smart scanning detects unused files across posts, page builders, ACF fields, and WooCommerce — then lets you safely remove them with a risk-scoring system that prevents costly mistakes.
features: Smart scan: posts, pages, widgets, theme mods
Used vs Unused dashboard with storage breakdown
"Where is it used?" location finder per file
Safe delete modal with thumbnail preview
proFeatures: Deep Detection: Elementor, ACF, Divi, WooCommerce
Risk Scoring (0–100) — know before you delete
PRO Trash: restore files before permanent delete
Bulk Cleanup by risk level (Low / Medium / All)
Advanced exclusion rules (folder, size, author, MIME)
3-day free trial — no credit card required

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.description: How I handle your data and privacy.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: Welcome to my portfolio. I respect your privacy and am committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy will inform you as to how I look after your personal data when you visit my website and tell you about your privacy rights and how the law protects you.

information.title: 2. Information I Collect
information.content: Currently, this portfolio website is primarily informational. I may collect data in the following ways:
items: Contact Information: If you use the contact form or email me directly, I will collect your name, email address, and the content of your message to respond to your inquiry.
Usage Data: I may use standard web analytics tools to understand how visitors interact with the site. This data is anonymized and helps me improve the user experience.

usage.title: 3. How I Use Your Information
usage.content: I only use your personal data when the law allows me to. Most commonly, I will use your personal data in the following circumstances:
items: To communicate with you in response to your inquiries.
To improve the website functionality and content.

security.title: 4. Data Security
security.content: I have put in place appropriate security measures to prevent your personal data from being accidentally lost, used, or accessed in an unauthorized way, altered, or disclosed.

links.title: 5. Third-Party Links
links.content: This website may include links to third-party websites (like GitHub, LinkedIn, etc.), plug-ins, and applications. Clicking on those links or enabling those connections may allow third parties to collect or share data about you. I do not control these third-party websites and am not responsible for their privacy statements.

contact.title: 6. Contact Me
contact.content: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or my privacy practices, please contact me at:

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.description: Rules and regulations for using this website.

agreement.title: 1. Agreement to Terms
agreement.content: By accessing this website, you agree to be bound by these Website Terms and Conditions of Use and agree that you are responsible for the agreement with any applicable local laws. If you disagree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from accessing this site.

ip.title: 2. Intellectual Property Rights
ip.content: All content, features, and functionality are owned by the site owner and are protected by international copyright, trademark, patent, trade secret, and other intellectual property or proprietary rights laws.
ip.license: You are granted a limited license only for purposes of viewing the material contained on this website.

restrictions.title: 3. Restrictions
restrictions.content: You are specifically restricted from all of the following:
items: Publishing any website material in any other media without prior consent.
Selling, sublicensing, and/or otherwise commercializing any website material.
Using this website in any way that is or may be damaging to this website.
Using this website in any way that impacts user access to this website.
Engaging in any data mining, data harvesting, data extracting, or any other similar activity in relation to this website.

disclaimer.title: 4. Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: The materials on this website are provided "as is". I make no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaim and negate all other warranties. Furthermore, I do not warrant or make any representations concerning the accuracy, likely results, or reliability of the use of the materials on its website or otherwise relating to such materials or on any sites linked to this site.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: In no event shall I or my suppliers be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on this website.

governing.title: 6. Governing Law
governing.content: Any claim related to this website shall be governed by the laws of the Dominican Republic without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

services.title: Website Audit & Action Plan
services.description: A focused technical and conversion audit for business owners who know their website has problems, but do not know what to fix first. I review speed, security, SEO basics, UX friction, plugins, hosting, and maintenance risks, then give you a prioritized plan.
services.painPoint: You are unsure whether to optimize, rebuild, migrate, or secure the site first.
services.evidence: Based on the same type of review work used across WordPress, Webflow, and public-sector projects.
services.bestFor: Established websites with performance, security, SEO, or maintenance doubts.
services.outcome: A clear action plan that separates urgent fixes from nice-to-have improvements.

services.title: Optimize & Protect Your Website
services.description: For websites that already exist but feel slow, fragile, outdated, or risky. I improve performance, clean technical debt, update risky pieces, harden the site, and make the platform easier to maintain.
services.painPoint: Your site works, but it is slow, exposed, hard to maintain, or quietly costing trust.
services.evidence: Ongoing contractor work supporting performance, security, maintenance, SEO, and visual fixes for a global training platform with 150K+ users.
services.bestFor: Businesses that want to improve the current website without rebuilding everything.
services.outcome: A faster, safer, cleaner website with fewer hidden risks and a stronger technical base.
services.pricingNote: Scope depends on site size, platform, user roles, plugin risk, hosting setup, and how much implementation is needed after the audit.

services.title: Hacked Site Recovery
services.description: Your site's been hacked. Don't panic. I'll clean the malware, close the vulnerabilities, restore your content, and implement protections to prevent it from happening again. Fast response, minimal downtime.
services.painPoint: Your website is infected, redirecting users, showing warnings, or has suspicious access.
services.evidence: Security and cleanup experience across WordPress environments with outdated plugins, exposed endpoints, and abandoned user access.
services.bestFor: Site owners whose website has been compromised, defaced, or infected with malware.
services.outcome: A clean, restored website with strengthened security to prevent future attacks.

services.title: Rebuild & Platform Migration
services.description: When the current platform is holding the business back, I rebuild or migrate the site with a plan for content, SEO, redirects, integrations, performance, and maintainability.
services.painPoint: Your site is trapped in an old setup, difficult CMS, heavy theme, or fragile builder.
services.evidence: Migration work across Truenorth, Puerto Rico traffic-safety, and other public-sector/corporate websites.
services.bestFor: Companies stuck on outdated platforms who want better performance, usability, and maintainability.
services.outcome: A modern, faster, more maintainable platform with zero data loss and preserved SEO rankings.

services.title: Websites & MVPs
services.description: A new website, landing page, CMS build, or MVP for businesses that need something clear, fast, maintainable, and credible. I handle strategy, UX direction, development, launch, and the technical setup behind it.
services.painPoint: You need a professional website or MVP, but you do not want a bloated build that becomes hard to maintain.
services.evidence: Includes from-scratch WordPress builds, public-sector websites, corporate sites, and custom web platforms.
services.bestFor: Founders, service businesses, and teams that need a new site or MVP with a real launch path.
services.outcome: A fast, credible website or MVP built to explain the offer, support SEO, and capture qualified leads.

quoteOptions.name: Landing Page / CMS Website
quoteOptions.description: Ideal for business sites, blogs, and content-driven projects. Built on a CMS or modern frontend depending on the use case.

quoteOptions.name: MVP with Framework
quoteOptions.description: Custom-built web app with React, Next.js, or Node. Useful for SaaS products, internal tools, and interactive platforms.

services.title: Ongoing Website Partner
services.description: Monthly technical support for businesses that need someone to keep the site healthy: updates, fixes, security checks, performance improvements, small feature work, and technical coordination.
services.painPoint: Your website keeps needing technical decisions, fixes, or support, but hiring a full-time developer is not the right move.
services.evidence: Current long-term contractor support across WordPress, PHP, SEO, servers, security, layout fixes, and maintenance.
services.bestFor: Teams with an active website that needs steady technical ownership.
services.outcome: A more stable website with a reliable technical partner who understands the business over time.
services.pricingNote: Retainers depend on response time, monthly hours, platform complexity, and whether server support is included.

modernize.title: Rebuild & Migrate

processSection.description: A transparent process built around communication and results.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We talk about your goals, your current setup, and what success looks like for you. No jargon, no pitch.

steps.title: Strategy

steps.title: Build & Iterate
steps.description: Development in stages with regular check-ins. You see progress as it happens, not just at the end.

steps.title: Launch & Beyond
steps.description: Deploy with confidence, monitor performance, and I stay around for support. No ghosting after launch.
